1.content:
To start things off, lets choose a path the story will take.

Swap through magical means- Your character of choice either becomes cursed, finds a spell, finds an artifact, or is effected by someone else to swap bodies with them.

Swap through machine- Somehow, your family comes into contact with a machine capable of switching minds!

Swap through remote- A powerful device with many functions has fallen right into your lap. Swap Bodies, Swap Clothes, Swap Parts, Swap Genders, Swap Personalities and so much more!

Swap through by accident- Through luck or some other factor, you swap bodies with one of the people around you.
1.title: Chose Your Story Path

info.brief_description: A collection of stories about swapping bodies with someone, be it family, friends or more
info.description:
Alright, let's jump right into it real quick!

Body Swap through magical means

Body swap through body swap machine

Body swap through the all too famous remote

Body swap through coincidence.

Each of the categories may go about it in their own ways, so if you want to introduce more magic? Go for it!
Wanna tell a story of aliens abducting you to examine how humans handle being placed in another lifeforms body? Crazy? No!

Here's a list of characters to use as a guideline:

John Chance- 39-year-old father of 4, married to his beautiful wife Sophia. Standing at a height of 6'4''. He has dirty blonde hair and sea-blue eyes.

Sophia Chance-36 Year old mother of the family, standing at a diminutive height of 5'4''. Brown-haired and ready to party, she dazzles all with her emerald eyes.

Anthony Chance-18 years old and ready to graduate, being the oldest child of the Chance family, he inherits his fathers' height and stands tall at 6'3'' with a lean body-type. Black hair and blue eyes fit his description just nicely.

Emilia Chance-14 years old and begging daddy to let her date, she was born a natural beauty, if a little small in the chest department. Despite this, she has mild body and social issues, hoping a man will come along and help her figure herself out a little. Blonde hair and blue-eyed with a petite frame, she stands at 5'3''.

Jason Chance-12 years old and hoping to fill out like his older brother, he's quite rebellious and loves picking on his sisters for the darndest things, using his size to his advantage. Though only 12, he already stands 5'6''. Blond hair and green eyes.

Sabrina Chance- At 9 years old Sabrina is the youngest of the Chance family and thusly the shortest at 4'2''. She has blonde hair with princess curls and blue eyes. She's quite shy but very intelligent. Wears girly glasses.



Hopefully people use correct grammar and leave at least 3 paragraphs(Around 3-4 sentences a piece)
